comment.body:
Just an idea to make chats/threads more efficient:

1. Subscribers can pay an additional $1 or $2 per month to hire an assistant who works one hour per day.
2. Separate chat groups:
    - Alma's Channels: could have several such as educational contents, trading signals, Q&A, etc. Only Alma and the assistant can post here.
    - Subscriber Channels: A space for us to discuss freely and help each other. The assistant will spend one hour per day selecting valuable questions or topics and forwarding them to Alma for answers in Alma's Q&A channel.
